column1: おそらく彼はもう帰ってしまったでしょう。
column2: おそらくかれはもうかえってしまったでしょう。
column3: He has most likely already gone home.
column4: おそらく (probably, most likely, I think it's likely)
column5: おそらく + [probability statement, often with だろう/と思う]
column6: expresses the speaker's reasoned estimate that something is probably true; slightly formal
column8: おそらく = reasoned probability (formal); たぶん = probably (casual); きっと = surely (emotional confidence); 確かに = certainly (higher certainty)
